div.head: The Chargé in Colombia (Daniels) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
1889. Reference despatch number 4683, November 2, 1944. Foreign Office inquired this morning whether Embassy could obtain early telegraphic reply to question raised by Foreign Office in its memorandum of October 31Not printed. regarding waiving of most-favored-nation rights in connection with reciprocal extension of commercial advantages between Colombia and neighboring nations. Matter apparently
considered urgent by Minister of Foreign Affairs because of recent presentation to Colombian Congress of Colombian-Ecuadoran Treaty (reference despatch number 4220 of August 12, 1944Not printed.) for ratification. Full text of treatyRepublica de Colombia, Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores, Tratados y Cofirvenios de Colombia, 1988–1948 (Bogotá, 1950), p. 83. as presented to Congress similar to text previously reported and is being forwarded by air.
